zones.notes: Official source reached via Municode API (productId 15749, node ART2BAZO); direct HTML/PDF fetch returned 403. Front 10 ft (enclosed livable); garages/carports 20 ft. Interior side 5 ft each, 15 ft aggregate. Rear 20 ft (30 ft if rear abuts arterial). Max building coverage 50%. Density 7.26 du/net acre applies under PAD overlay; conventional density governed by min-lot compliance. FAR and max_stories not specified for RS districts; parking per Chapter 32.

Official via Municode API. Front 10 ft (livable); garages/carports 20 ft. Interior side 5 ft each, 15 ft aggregate. Rear 20 ft (30 ft if abutting arterial). Max building coverage 45%. Density 6.22 du/net acre under PAD overlay.

Official via Municode API. Front 15 ft (livable); garages/carports 25 ft. Interior side 7 ft each, 17 ft aggregate. Rear 25 ft (30 ft if abutting arterial). Max building coverage 45%. Density 4.84 du/net acre under PAD overlay.
Official via Municode API. Front 22 ft (livable); garages/carports 30 ft. Interior side 7 ft each, 20 ft aggregate. Rear 30 ft. Max building coverage 40%. Density 2.9 du/net acre under PAD overlay.

Official via Municode API. Interior-lot width 130 ft. Front 22 ft (livable); garages/carports 30 ft. Interior side 10 ft each, 30 ft aggregate. Rear 30 ft. Max building coverage 35%. Density 1.24 du/net acre under PAD overlay.

Official via Municode API. Min lot area 43,560 sf (1 acre). Interior-lot width 130 ft. Front 22 ft (livable); garages/carports 30 ft. Interior side 10 ft each, 30 ft aggregate. Street side 30 ft. Rear 30 ft. Max building coverage 25%. Density 1.0 du/net acre under PAD overlay.

Official via Municode API. Min lot 90,000 sf. Interior-lot width 150 ft. Front 22 ft (livable); garages/carports 30 ft. Interior side 20 ft each, 40 ft aggregate. Rear 30 ft. Max building coverage 25%. Density 0.48 du/net acre under PAD overlay.

zones.zone_name: Residential Small Lot Single Dwelling District
zones.notes: Official via Municode API. min_lot_size_sf is minimum INDIVIDUAL lot area 2,000 sf (min average lot area of subdivision is 2,500 sf). Interior-lot width 25 ft (corner 30 ft). Front-building-wall 12 ft; garage 20 ft; porch 7 ft. Interior side 3 ft each, 8 ft aggregate. Rear 15 ft (13 ft for alley-accessed garage). Max 2 stories (3rd story possible per 11-5-3(A)(4)). Max density not given as a numeric cap in the RSL table; governed by lot size.

zones.zone_name: Residential Small Lot Single Dwelling District
zones.notes: Official via Municode API. Vault 'RSL-3' maps to official RSL-3.0 column. min_lot_size_sf is minimum INDIVIDUAL lot area 2,750 sf (min subdivision average 3,250 sf). Interior-lot width 30 ft (corner 35 ft). Front-building-wall 15 ft; garage 20 ft; porch 10 ft. Interior side 4 ft each, 9 ft aggregate. Rear 20 ft (13 ft alley garage). Max 2 stories.

zones.zone_name: Residential Small Lot Single Dwelling District
zones.notes: Official via Municode API. Vault 'RSL-4' maps to official RSL-4.0 column (note: official code also has a separate RSL-4.5 district not in the vault roster). min_lot_size_sf is minimum INDIVIDUAL lot area 3,500 sf (min subdivision average 4,000 sf). Interior-lot width 35 ft (corner 40 ft). Front-building-wall 15 ft; garage 20 ft; porch 10 ft. Interior side 4 ft each, 10 ft aggregate. Rear 20 ft (13 ft alley garage). Max lot coverage 75%. Max 2 stories.

Official via Municode API. Min lot 7,200 sf; min lot area/DU 2,904 sf. Max density 15 du/net acre. Max lot coverage 70%; max building coverage 45%. Min lot width is use-dependent (single-detached 36 ft, single-attached 36 ft, multi-residence 60 ft) so width left TBD. Setbacks are not single by-right numbers: front/street-side vary by street class (6-lane arterial 30 ft, 4-lane 20 ft, collector 25 ft, local 20 ft, freeway 30 ft); interior side 5 ft (1 detached) / 10 ft (2 units) / 20 ft single-story (3+ units, 15 ft per story multi); rear 15 ft (1-2 units). Additional setback if adjacent to RS district. Min open space 200 sf/unit.

Official via Municode API. Min lot 6,000 sf; min lot area/DU 2,183 sf. Max density 20 du/net acre. Max height 40 ft. Max lot coverage 70%; max building coverage 50%. Lot width use-dependent (detached 30 ft, attached 25 ft, multi 60 ft). Setbacks vary by street class/adjacency (same structure as RM-2); interior side 5/10 ft, rear 15 ft (1-2 units). Min open space 175 sf/unit.

Official via Municode API. Min lot 6,000 sf; min lot area/DU 1,452 sf. Max density 30 du/net acre. Max height 40 ft. Max lot coverage 70%; max building coverage 55%. Lot width use-dependent (detached 25 ft, attached 25 ft, multi 60 ft). Setbacks vary by street class/adjacency; interior side 5/10 ft, rear 15 ft (1-2 units). Min open space 150 sf/unit.

Official via Municode API. Min lot 6,000 sf; min lot area/DU 1,000 sf. Max density 43 du/net acre; min density 20 du/net acre. Max height 50 ft. Max lot coverage 70%. Lot width: detached/attached 25 ft, multi 60 ft. Setbacks vary by street class/adjacency; setback to RS district limited to 25 ft (no per-story increase). Min open space 120 sf/unit (roof areas may count up to 50%).

Official via Municode API. Min lot area 10 acres = 435,600 sf (acres x 43,560). Min lot width 400 ft. Max density 0.1 du/acre. Max height 30 ft / 2 stories. Front 30 ft; interior side 60 ft each (120 ft aggregate); street side 30 ft; rear 60 ft. max_lot_coverage_pct here is Maximum Building Coverage (15%); the AG table lists no separate overall lot-coverage figure.

Official via Municode API (prior draft was all TBD). Non-residential max height 50 ft. Max residential density 40 du/net acre. Non-residential setbacks: front 15 ft (may reduce to 10 ft on arterial if not adjacent to residential); interior side 0 ft (10 ft if adjacent to residential); street side 15 ft; rear 0 ft (10 ft if adjacent to residential). Residential setbacks differ (front 15 ft arterial / 10 ft non-arterial; interior side 10 ft; rear 20 ft). No minimum lot area, FAR, or overall lot-coverage figure given in the DB table.

Official via Municode API. Non-residential max height 40 ft. Non-residential setbacks: front 15 ft (reducible to 10 ft on arterial if not adjacent to residential); interior side 0 ft (10 ft if adjacent to residential); street side 15 ft; rear 0 ft (10 ft if adjacent to residential). Residential development standards in DB-2 are Plan Specific (max density set via Council Use Permit). No min lot area/FAR/lot-coverage figure given.

Official source reached via Municode API and confirms the DC (Downtown Core) District sets NO fixed dimensional standards: per Sec. 11-8-6(A), minimum lot area, yard setbacks, maximum residential density, and building height all vary by project and are determined by the Planning & Zoning Board through site plan review. All numeric fields therefore correctly TBD per the official code (not for lack of data).

Official via Municode API (prior draft all TBD). Min lot 6,000 sf (1 dwelling unit; DR-1 limited to 1 DU). Max height 30 ft. Front 15 ft; interior side 5 ft; street side 10 ft; rear 15 ft (1-story) / 20 ft (2-story). Max density NA in DR-1. Min open space 400 sf/DU. No FAR or lot-coverage figure; min lot width not listed in DR table.

Official via Municode API. Min lot 6,000 sf (1 DU); 11,000 sf (2 DU); 15,000 (3 DU); 18,000 (4+ DU). Max density 12 du/net acre. Max height 30 ft. Front 15 ft; street side 10 ft; rear 15 ft (1-story)/20 ft (2-story). Interior side is unit-count dependent (1-2 units 5 ft, 3+ units 15 ft); side_setback shown as the 1-unit figure (5 ft). Min open space 400/200 sf per DU.

Official via Municode API. Min lot 6,000 sf (1 DU); 7,000 (2 DU); 11,000 (3 DU); 15,000 (4 DU); 18,000 (5+ DU). Max density 40 du/net acre. Max height 40 ft. Front 10 ft; interior side 10 ft (1-story) / 15 ft (2-story) / 20 ft (3-story); street side 10 ft; rear 10 ft (1-story) / 20 ft (2-3 story). Min open space 400/200 sf per DU.

Official via Municode API (prior draft all TBD). GC = C-3. Min lot 5,000 sf; min lot width 50 ft; min lot depth 100 ft. Max lot coverage 80%; max height 30 ft. max_density_dua 25 = MAXIMUM RESIDENTIAL density (residential is CUP-only in GC). Front/street-side setbacks vary by street class (6/4-lane arterial 15 ft, major/midsection collector 15 ft, industrial/commercial collector 20 ft, local 20 ft, freeway 30 ft bldg). Interior side/rear depend on adjacent district (e.g., 25/50/75 ft by story adjacent to RS); hence setbacks TBD.

Official via Municode API (prior draft all TBD). Min SITE area 1.0 acre = 43,560 sf. Min lot width 100 ft; depth 100 ft. Max lot coverage 90%; max height 50 ft. Front/street-side vary by street class (arterial 15 ft, collectors 20 ft, local 20 ft, freeway 30 ft bldg). Interior side/rear: adjacent to AG/RS/RSL/RM = 1 ft per ft of bldg height, min 20 ft; adjacent to LI/GI/HI = 0 ft; hence setbacks TBD.

Official via Municode API. Min SITE area 1.0 acre = 43,560 sf. Min lot width 100 ft; depth 100 ft. Max lot coverage 90%; max height 50 ft. Setbacks same structure as GI (street-class for front/street-side; adjacency-based for interior side/rear); hence TBD.

Official source reached via Municode API. Per Sec. 11-12-4(A), ID-1 has NO independent dimensional standards: the standards of the underlying base zoning district apply unless specifically modified by City Council when the ID-1 district is approved. All numeric fields TBD per the official code by design (no fixed table exists).

Official source reached via Municode API. Per Sec. 11-12-4(B), ID-2 development standards are established case-by-case through review and approval of an Infill Incentive Plan (IIP) under Sec. 11-12-5; no fixed dimensional table exists. All numeric fields TBD per the official code by design.

Official via Municode API (prior draft all TBD). LC = C-2. Min lot 10,000 sf; min lot width 100 ft; depth 100 ft. Max lot coverage 80%; max height 30 ft. max_density_dua 25 = MAXIMUM RESIDENTIAL density (residential CUP-only). Setbacks vary by street class (front/street-side) and adjacency (interior side/rear); hence TBD.

Official via Municode API (prior draft all TBD). Min SITE area 1.0 acre = 43,560 sf. Min lot width 100 ft; depth 100 ft. Max lot coverage 90%; max height 40 ft. Front/street-side vary by street class; interior side/rear adjacent to AG/RS/RSL/RM = 1 ft per ft of height (min 20 ft), adjacent to LI/GI/HI = 0 ft; hence setbacks TBD.

Official via Municode API (prior draft all TBD). IMPORTANT: in the current code, MX appears only with the -U character designator (MX-U) in Table 11-6-3.B; there is no separate plain 'MX' column. Values shown are the MX-U standards. Min lot 5,000 sf; min lot width 50 ft; depth 100 ft. Max lot coverage 80%; max height 45 ft. Front/street-side MINIMUM 5 ft (also a 25 ft MAXIMUM front/street-side yard applies). Interior side/rear depend on adjacency (RS: 15/25/35 ft by story; RM: 15 ft +10 ft/story) so side/rear TBD. Min residential density 15, max residential density 25 du/net acre (max_density_dua = 25; more possible by use permit). Human review recommended to confirm MX vs MX-U mapping.

Official via Municode API (prior draft all TBD). NC = C-1. Min lot 5,000 sf; min lot width 50 ft; depth 100 ft. Max lot coverage 80%; max height 30 ft. max_density_dua 15 = MAXIMUM RESIDENTIAL density (residential CUP-only). Setbacks vary by street class (front/street-side) and adjacency (interior side/rear: 25/50/75 ft by story adjacent to RS); hence TBD.

Official via Municode API (prior draft all TBD). OC = O-S. Min lot 10,000 sf; min lot width 100 ft; depth 100 ft. Max lot coverage 80%; max height 30 ft. max_density_dua 25 = MAXIMUM RESIDENTIAL density (residential CUP-only). Setbacks vary by street class and adjacency; hence TBD.

Official via Municode API. PC has no per-lot dimensional table; all density/FAR/height/setback standards are set project-by-project via the adopted Community Plan and its land-use budget (Sec. 11-11-2). The only fixed dimensional figure is the DISTRICT minimum area of 160 contiguous acres = 6,969,600 sf (160 x 43,560), recorded here in min_lot_size_sf as the district minimum area, NOT a per-lot minimum. All other fields TBD by design. Human review advised given the non-standard meaning of min_lot_size_sf for PC.

Official via Municode API (prior draft all TBD). Min SITE area 2.5 acres = 108,900 sf (2.5 x 43,560); smaller lots allowed for master-planned development with shared parking. Min lot width 100 ft; depth 100 ft. Max lot coverage 90%. Max height is 'Plan Specific' in the PEP column (hence TBD). Front/street-side setbacks vary by street class; interior/rear setbacks adjacent to LI/GI/HI are 'Plan Specific', adjacent to residential = 1 ft per ft of height (min 20 ft); hence setbacks TBD.

Official via Municode API (prior draft all TBD). Minimum site area: None. Max height is conditional: 30 ft within 60 ft of RS/RSL/DR-1, otherwise 60 ft (max_height_ft set to the general 60 ft figure). Front/street-side yards vary by adjacent street class (6-lane arterial 30 ft, 4-lane 20 ft, major/midsection collector 25 ft, industrial/commercial collector 20 ft, local 20 ft, freeway 30 ft). Interior side/rear depend on adjacency (RS: 20 ft / 25 ft if site >=5 ac; RM: 20 ft single-story, 15 ft/story; non-residential 15 ft/story); hence setbacks TBD. No lot area/width, density, FAR, or lot-coverage figures in the PS table.
